Key Ingredients

Powered by Nature

Four science-backed naturals working together for your best skin day, every day.

🌻

Sunflower Oil

Rich in Linoleic acid (Omega-6) and Vitamin E, it restores the skin's natural moisture barrier and soothes irritation gently.

⚗️

Vitamin C

Inhibits excess melanin, boosts collagen, and neutralises free radicals for a visibly brighter, even-toned complexion.

🧴

Shea Butter

A deeply nourishing emollient that conditions and softens skin while providing a protective, non-greasy film.

💎

Niacinamide

Reduces pore appearance, strengthens the skin barrier, and works synergistically with Vitamin C for amplified brightening.

Skin Education

Why Sunflower + Vitamin C Are Becoming India's Favourite Skincare Duo

In a world filled with synthetic cosmetics and confusing ingredient lists, two naturals are cutting through the noise: Sunflower Extract and Vitamin C. Together with Shea Butter and Niacinamide, they form NaturaGene's core formulation philosophy — clean, effective, and truly skin-loving.

The Science Behind Sunflower Oil

Sunflower (Helianthus annuus) seed oil has a fatty acid profile dominated by Linoleic acid (Omega-6) at 65–70%, making it exceptional for barrier repair. Ceramide-deficient skin — often the cause of acne, eczema, and sensitivity — benefits directly from topical Linoleic acid replenishment. Its Vitamin E content adds antioxidant protection that synergises powerfully with Vitamin C.

Vitamin C + Niacinamide: A Brightening Dream Team

While Vitamin C inhibits tyrosinase (the enzyme behind dark spots), Niacinamide simultaneously blocks the transfer of melanin to skin cells. Together, they tackle hyperpigmentation from both ends. NaturaGene uses a pH-buffered, stable Vitamin C derivative encapsulated within the glycerin matrix to stay active at the point of skin contact.

Why Crystal-Clear Glycerin Makes a Difference

Most commercial soaps use an opaque base that strips glycerin from the formulation (glycerin is a valuable byproduct sold separately). NaturaGene retains all natural glycerin — giving the soap its jewel-like clarity and its extraordinary moisturising properties. Glycerin is a natural humectant that draws moisture from the air into your skin.

Daily Use Tips

  • Morning: Lather for 30–60 seconds, rinse with lukewarm water. Follow with SPF. The antioxidant boost from Vitamin C helps shield against UV-induced oxidative stress.
  • Evening: Use to remove daily pollution, SPF, and light makeup. Let your skin's overnight repair cycle begin on a clean, moisturised base.
  • Storage: Keep on a well-drained soap dish to extend bar life. Store away from direct sunlight. Shelf life: 18–24 months.
  • Patch test: Always do a 24-hour patch test on your inner arm before full facial use, especially for sensitive skin types.

Frequently Asked Questions
